mapper.select: SELECT pw.id, pw.name, pw.source_name, pw.source_url, pw.license_name, pw.license_url, pw.tag, pw.word_count, CASE WHEN upw.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS subscribed, COALESCE(upw.completed_count, 0) AS completed_count, COALESCE(upw.wrong_count, 0) AS wrong_count, CASE WHEN upw.id IS NULL THEN 1 WHEN upw.current_sort_order >= pw.word_count THEN pw.word_count + 1 ELSE upw.current_sort_order + 1 END AS next_sort_order, pw.created_at, pw.updated_at FROM public_wordbooks pw LEFT JOIN user_public_wordbooks upw ON upw.public_wordbook_id = pw.id AND upw.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY FIELD(pw.tag, 'cet4', 'cet6', 'ky', 'toefl', 'ielts', 'gre'), pw.name
SELECT id, name, source_name, source_url, license_name, license_url, tag, word_count, created_at, updated_at FROM public_wordbooks WHERE id = #{publicWordbookId} LIMIT 1

SELECT pw.id, pw.name, pw.source_name, pw.source_url, pw.license_name, pw.license_url, pw.tag, pw.word_count, CASE WHEN upw.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS subscribed, COALESCE(upw.completed_count, 0) AS completed_count, COALESCE(upw.wrong_count, 0) AS wrong_count, CASE WHEN upw.id IS NULL THEN 1 WHEN upw.current_sort_order >= pw.word_count THEN pw.word_count + 1 ELSE upw.current_sort_order + 1 END AS next_sort_order, pw.created_at, pw.updated_at FROM public_wordbooks pw LEFT JOIN user_public_wordbooks upw ON upw.public_wordbook_id = pw.id AND upw.user_id = #{userId} WHERE pw.id = #{publicWordbookId} LIMIT 1

SELECT v.id AS public_entry_id, m.sort_order, v.word, v.phonetic, v.meaning_cn, v.example_sentence, v.bnc_rank, v.frq_rank, v.wordfreq_zipf FROM public_wordbook_entries m JOIN public_vocabulary_entries v ON v.id = m.public_entry_id WHERE m.public_wordbook_id = #{publicWordbookId} ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC, v.word ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_public_wordbooks( user_id, public_wordbook_id, current_sort_order, completed_count, wrong_count, subscribed_at ) VALUES(#{userId}, #{publicWordbookId}, 0, 0, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE user_public_wordbooks SET current_sort_order = 0, completed_count = 0, wrong_count = 0, last_studied_at = NULL WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND public_wordbook_id = #{publicWordbookId}
UPDATE quiz_sessions SET status = 'CANCELLED', finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = 'PUBLIC_WORDBOOK' AND target_id = #{publicWordbookId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, source_name FROM wordbooks
